dashboard.label: SOC Endpoint Threat Dashboard
dashboard.description: Real-time endpoint activity mapped to MITRE ATT&CK via Sysmon logs.

chart.title: Event volume by Sysmon Event ID (last 24h)

search.query: index=endpoint source="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=1 (Image="*powershell.exe" OR OriginalFileName="PowerShell.EXE") (CommandLine="*-ep*" OR CommandLine="*-ExecutionPolicy*" OR CommandLine="*-encodedcommand*") | table _time host User ParentImage CommandLine

index=endpoint source="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=1 | eval image_name=mvindex(split(Image, "\\"), -1) | where image_name != OriginalFileName AND NOT (OriginalFileName="-" OR OriginalFileName="null") | table _time host User Image OriginalFileName CommandLine
index=endpoint source="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=8 TargetImage="*lsass.exe" | table _time host SourceImage SourceProcessId TargetImage StartAddress
